zh.Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾希亞活 卡素

zh.Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭越可爾希亞活
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Aldebrough於1336年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir Ivo de Aldeburgh41歲，母親Mary36歲。他於1353年與Elizabeth de Lisle在英國英格蘭越可爾希亞活結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年4月1日在英國越可爾希亞活享年52歲，埋葬在英國越可爾阿爾德波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Aldebrough于1336年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Ivo de Aldeburgh41岁，母亲Mary36岁。他于1353年与Elizabeth de Lisle在英国英格兰越可爾希亞活结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年4月1日在英国越可爾希亞活享年52岁，埋葬在英国越可爾阿爾德波洛。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Aldebrough was born in 1336, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Ivo de Aldeburgh, was 41 and his mother, Mary, was 36. He married Elizabeth de Lisle in 1353, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 1 April 1388, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Aldborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Aldebrough est né en 1336, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ivo de Aldeburgh, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Lisle en 1353, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1388, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Aldborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Aldebrough 1336 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ivo de Aldeburgh 41 und seine Mutter Mary 36. Er hat 1353 in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Lisle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. April 1388 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Harewood, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Aldborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Aldebrough è nato il nel 1336 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Ivo de Aldeburgh, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Lisle nel 1353, nel Harewood, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 aprile 1388, nel Harewood, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Aldborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Aldebroughが1336年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Ivo de Aldeburghは41歳，母Maryは36歳であった。1353年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドでElizabeth de Lisleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年4月1日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドで52歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアアルドボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Aldebrough(이)가 1336년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ivo de Aldeburgh(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1353년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하레우드에서 Elizabeth de Lisle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 4월 1일 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 알드버루그h에 묻혔다.

mn.Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kin: Harewood, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Aldebrough nasceu em 1336, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ivo de Aldeburgh, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Lisle em 1353, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de abril de 1388, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Aldborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Aldebrough родился в 1336 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ivo de Aldeburgh было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mary, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Lisle в 1353 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 1 апреля 1388 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности алдбороую, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Aldebrough nació en 1336, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ivo de Aldeburgh, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Lisle en 1353, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de abril de 1388, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Aldborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
